notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Joc Pederson to 3rd. Wyatt Langford out at 2nd. Brandon Nimmo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Joc Pederson to 3rd. Wyatt Langford out at 2nd. Brandon Nimmo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran singles on a ground ball to pitcher Tyler Zuber. Ezequiel Duran to 2nd. Ezequiel Duran advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Tyler Zuber.
